title: 3 Hidden Gems for Value Investors to Buy Now
text: It's disheartening how the spotlight often falls on a handful of well-known names in the stock market. While it's understandable why powerhouses like Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL ) and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA ) dominate headlines, investors must realize that hidden gems and undervalued stocks can be just as lucrative.

title: 3 Hidden Gem Dividend Stocks to Buy Now
text: Starbucks has an underrated dividend. Pentair's track record of increasing its dividend suggests investors can look forward to many more years of growing dividends.

title: Pentair (PNR) Gains From Strategic Actions Despite Cost Woes
text: Pentair (PNR) benefits from the implementation of its growth initiatives amid supply-chain issues and elevated cost levels.

title: Pentair to Attend UBS, Stifel and Deutsche Bank Investor Conferences
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve and enjoy water, life's most essential resource, will be attending and presenting at upcoming investor conferences on June 6th and June 7th. President and Chief Executive Officer John L. Stauch will attend the UBS Global Industrials & Transportation Conference on June 6, 2023 and present at the Deutsche Bank Global Industrials, Materials & Building Products Conference on June 7, 2023.
